_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: AVS Orchard
project.address: Plot No. GH-03C, Sector 77, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.tagline: Pure Tranquility Adjacent to Megdutam Park
project.description: A premium ready-to-move-in residential society in Sector 77, Noida, adjacent to a 45-acre master green and 500m from Megdutam Park.
project.long_description: AVS Orchard in Sector 77, Noida, is an exquisite ready-to-move-in residential development developed by AVP Buildtech Pvt. Ltd. Spanning a beautifully planned 5.0-acre enclave, this fully completed and highly operational society houses 589 premium apartments across 8 elegant towers rising G+19 floors. Blessed with an exceptional micro-climate, the development is located adjacent to a massive 45-acre municipal master green zone and just 500 meters from the 20-acre Megdutam Park, offering residents an unparalleled, pollution-free living environment. Built to premium luxury specifications, select configurations feature full imported Italian marble flooring, high-speed elevators (3 lifts per tower), and Vastu-compliant architectural planning. The society represents a thriving, close-knit community of over 650 families, offering high-end sports facilities, solar lighting integration, and beautifully manicured gardens.
marketing_claims: Adjacent to a massive 45-acre master green area
Just 500m from the spectacular 20-acre Megdutam Park
Premium specifications including Italian Marble flooring
3 high-speed lifts per tower for minimal waiting times
Thriving ready community of over 650 families

builder.name: AVP Buildtech Pvt. Ltd.
builder.company_overview: AVP Buildtech Private Limited is a highly respected and trusted real estate development company with decades of deep construction experience in Delhi NCR. The builder is highly recognized for incorporating eco-friendly features, Vastu-compliant designs, and top-tier material specifications like Italian marble. AVP Buildtech enjoys an outstanding customer satisfaction rating and is renowned for delivering beautifully structured residential spaces with low loading factors and excellent layouts.

unit_types.name: 2 BHK (Executive)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 2 BHK overlooking central lawns
unit_types.description: A brilliantly planned, space-efficient 2 BHK apartment designed to optimize natural ventilation, with two distinct balconies overlooking green reserves.
whats_included: High-grade vitrified tiles in all living spaces
Concealed copper wiring with modular switches
Modular kitchen platform with deep stainless steel sink

unit_types.name: 3 BHK + 3T (Luxuria)
unit_types.subtitle: Premium 3 BHK with Italian Marble
unit_types.description: An exceptionally spacious three-bedroom apartment with 3 wide balconies looking out directly onto central garden parks, highlighted by full Italian marble flooring in major formal areas.
whats_included: Vitrified floor tiles in bedrooms and kitchens
Polished Italian marble flooring in formal living and dining zones
Textured acrylic paint finishes on walls
Double-bowl deep stainless steel kitchen sink

unit_types.name: 4 BHK + 5T + Servant (Imperial)
unit_types.subtitle: Imperial 4 BHK Duplex/Simplex
unit_types.description: The flagship configuration featuring a massive four-bedroom design with an attached servant room, integrated dress areas, and wrap balconies providing majestic views of the park.
whats_included: High-grade flooring and premium sanitary installations
Italian marble across living and formal drawing areas
Fully modular high-end kitchen with quartz finishes
Private elevator foyer on select towers

connectivity.notes: Direct regional transit access — 4 mins drive

connectivity.notes: Seamless retail, high-street shopping, and hypermarket

connectivity.notes: Highly trusted school in the neighboring block

other_charges.label: Gas Pipeline and Power Back-up Connection

assumptions: All prices are based on current broker registers and secondary market resale averages as of Q3 2026.
GST is completely 0% for ready-to-move-in assets where Completion Certificate (CC) has been issued.
Circle rates and registration taxes follow UP state government guidelines.

payment_plan.notes: Registry process moves swiftly post bank mortgage verification and NOC clearances.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: AVS Orchard is an exceptionally peaceful ready-to-move-in society in Sector 77, Noida, adjacent to a 45-acre master green and just 500 meters from the 20-acre Megdutam Park.
why_buy: Lush Green Surroundings: Directly adjacent to a massive 45-acre master green area for clean air and beautiful views.
Premium Specifications: Luxury apartments featuring full imported Italian marble flooring and premium bathroom fixtures.
3 High-Speed Lifts: Three fast elevators per tower minimize waiting times and maximize convenience.
why_avoid: Slightly Premium Resale: Command a minor premium because of the high specification standards and park proximity.
Density: Active residential community with G+19 levels on 5 acres.
decision_profile.best_for: Families looking for quiet green surroundings, seniors desiring proximity to Megdutam Park, and upgraders seeking premium specs.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative short-term flippers or buyers seeking isolated low-density villas.

buyerPersonas.headline: Active Health Living next to Megdutam Park
reasons: Just 500m to Sector 50's majestic 20-acre Megdutam Park.
Adjacent to 45-acre master green zone for cleaner air.

buyerPersonas.headline: Premium Interiors and Quick Transit
reasons: Italian marble flooring in formal living areas and luxury sanitary fixtures.

riskRadar.description: Completely physical handovers done. Zero construction risk.
Registries active, clean sub-lease deeds, zero litigation flags.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Driven by locality maturity, commercial office demand, and close park access.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly popular renting hub among mid-segment working families due to nearby schools.
investment_insights.market_desc: Consistent transactional volume in the secondary resale segment.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Easy exit options. Resale transactions complete rapidly due to the society's high reputation.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Green Corridor
neighborhood_advantages.description: High-rise residential belt surrounded by protected municipal green lungs.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative (requires immediate ready status with low loading factors and structural durability)
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family with school-going children and elderly parents
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aims to secure premium, spacious housing with immediate park access and high-end construction finishes like Italian marble.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: AVS Orchard represents a highly compelling, ready-to-move-in green sanctuary in Sector 77. Combining direct proximity to Megdutam Park with premium interior finishes like full Italian marble, it is one of the most balanced lifestyle options in the sector.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: For residents, the green surroundings are a major daily perk, especially for seniors and active runners. Spacious layouts with three high-speed elevators ensure seamless convenience.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: A stable capital-preservation play backed by high rental popularity. Locality maturity ensures strong resale demand over the long run.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Highly recommended for families. Extensive central play areas, nearby multi-speciality hospitals, and schools under 5 km.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Offers consistent 4% rental yields and rapid tenant acquisition due to the project's green and premium appeal.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Provides high premium standards including polished Italian marble in drawing zones and CP fittings of Jaquar/Kohler, though missing private plunge pools or full home automation.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero delivery risk as the society has been fully delivered and inhabited since 2019. Stable active registrations.
negotiation_leverage: Leverage older ready towers to negotiate competitive per-sqft pricing.
Highlight competitive prices in older Sector 75 projects to secure best resale rates.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Perfect buying window. If an immaculate unit is available at approx ₹11,000 per sqft of super area, close the transaction immediately.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Significantly better green environment with closer proximity to Megdutam Park; premium interior specs including Italian marble flooring.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Closer walking distance to Sector 76 metro station.
competitors.verdict: Express Zenith wins on pure metro walkway proximity; AVS Orchard wins on superior green environment and interior luxury specifications.
competitors.price_delta_note: AVS Orchard is approx Rs 1,000/sqft cheaper than Express Zenith.
